login.title: AvatarDesk Dashboard
login.subtitle: Enter your tenant email to receive a magic link.
login.sentBody: Phase 1 (dev mode): the link was written to .last-magic-link.local in the repo root. Open the file and click the URL.
login.devModeNote: Phase 1 — dev mode active (magic link via server console). See ADR 006.

avatar.title: Avatar configuration
avatar.subtitle: Changes take effect on the next conversation — no restart required.
avatar.avatarHint: Beyond Presence avatar ID. Pick from the curated list or paste your own.
avatar.languageHint: ISO code of the conversation language. When you switch, also update the greeting and persona prompt; the ElevenLabs voice must support Multilingual v2.
avatar.personaHint: System instruction for the LLM. Tone, address, behavior.
avatar.greetingHint: First line the avatar speaks when the modal opens.
avatar.screenShareBody: End users can share their screen; the avatar recognizes visible UI elements and gives click-by-click help. Frames are sent to an LLM provider (Anthropic) and never persisted. Only enable this if your end-user contexts cannot contain sensitive data (banking, health, PII). Each session also requires explicit end-user consent.

knowledge.title: Knowledge base
knowledge.subtitle: Upload PDFs the avatar will use as a knowledge source. Indexing takes seconds to minutes depending on size.
knowledge.uploadHint: Max 25 MB, PDF only. Other formats coming in phase 2.

embed.title: Embed snippet
embed.subtitlePart1: Paste this snippet into your tenant website. Replace the placeholder
embed.keyHint: For security reasons we never show the key in the dashboard. You'll find it in .tenant-api-key.local in the repo root.
embed.rotateConfirmBody: All current widget embeds using the old key will respond with 401. You'll need to roll out the new snippet everywhere.
embed.rotateInfo: New key written to .{file} in the repo root (chmod 0600, gitignored). Old embeds respond with 401 from now on.

conversations.title: Conversations
conversations.subtitle: All conversations your end users had with Sofia. Click a row to see the transcript.
conversations.emptyBody: As soon as your end users start talking to Sofia they'll appear here.
conversations.notFoundBody: It may have been deleted or belongs to a different tenant.
conversations.activeHint: This conversation is still running — the transcript updates on every reload.
